ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instructions" (
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instruction */,
  "mnemonic" TEXT /* Mnemonic of the instruction (e.g., SWAP, TAS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instruction */,
  "instruction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instruction type (e.g., arithmetic, logical, control flow) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the instruction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the instruction was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the instruction */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the instruction was last updated */,
  "syntax" TEXT /* Syntax of the instruction */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example usage of the instruction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instruction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructions_instruction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("instruction_type_id") REFERENCES instruction_types ("instruction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruction_types" (
  "instruction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instruction type */,
  "instruction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instruction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instruction type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the instruction type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the instruction type was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the instruction type */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the instruction type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instruction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_types_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processors" (
  "processor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processor */,
  "processor_name" TEXT /* Name of the processor model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the processor (e.g., 68000, 68008, 68010) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the processor model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the processor model was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the processor model */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the processor model was last updated */,
  "processor_description" TEXT /* Description of the processor model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processors_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processors_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruction_processor_compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility entry */,
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instruction */,
  "processor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processor model */,
  "is_compatible" INTEGER /* Whether the instruction is compatible with the processor model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the compatibility entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the compatibility entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the compatibility entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the compatibility entry was last updated */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the compatibility entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_processor_compatibility_instruction_id FOREIGN KEY ("instruction_id") REFERENCES instructions ("instruction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_processor_compatibility_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_processor_compatibility_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_processor_compatibility_processor_id FOREIGN KEY ("processor_id") REFERENCES processors ("processor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the platform was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruction_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instruction */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_versions_instruction_id FOREIGN KEY ("instruction_id") REFERENCES instructions ("instruction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processor_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "processor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processor model */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processor_versions_processor_id FOREIGN KEY ("processor_id") REFERENCES processors ("processor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processor_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruction_type_processor_compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility entry */,
  "instruction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instruction type */,
  "processor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processor model */,
  "is_compatible" INTEGER /* Whether the instruction type is compatible with the processor model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the compatibility entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the compatibility entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the compatibility entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the compatibility entry was last updated */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the compatibility entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_type_processor_compatibility_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_type_processor_compatibility_processor_id FOREIGN KEY ("processor_id") REFERENCES processors ("processor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_type_processor_compatibility_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_type_processor_compatibility_instruction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("instruction_type_id") REFERENCES instruction_types ("instruction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role assignment */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_roles_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruction_processor_version_compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility entry */,
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instruction */,
  "processor_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processor version */,
  "is_compatible" INTEGER /* Whether the instruction is compatible with the processor version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the compatibility entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the compatibility entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the compatibility entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the compatibility entry was last updated */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the compatibility entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_processor_version_compatibility_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_processor_version_compatibility_processor_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("processor_version_id") REFERENCES processor_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_processor_version_compatibility_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruction_processor_version_compatibility_instruction_id FOREIGN KEY ("instruction_id") REFERENCES instructions ("instruction_id")
)
